title: Vector
description: Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

X.description: Dimension along global X coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Y.description: Dimension along global Y coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Z.description: Dimension along global Z coordinate axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
